thi10:1.0.213: p_19Th2_285"Kalyāṇamittatā muninā,lokaṁ ādissa vaṇṇitā;Kalyāṇamitte bhajamāno,api bālo paṇḍito assa.
thi10:1.0.214: p_19Th2_286Bhajitabbā sappurisā,Paññā tathā vaḍḍhati bhajantānaṁ;Bhajamāno sappurise,Sabbehipi dukkhehi pamucceyya.
thi10:1.0.215: p_19Th2_287Dukkhañca vijāneyya,Dukkhassa ca samudayaṁ nirodhaṁ;Aṭṭhaṅgikañca maggaṁ,Cattāripi ariyasaccāni".
thi10:1.0.216: p_19Th2_288"Dukkho itthibhāvo,Akkhāto purisadammasārathinā;Sapattikampi hi dukkhaṁ,Appekaccā sakiṁ vijātāyo.
thi10:1.0.217: p_19Th2_289Galake api kantanti,Sukhumāliniyo visāni khādanti;Janamārakamajjhagatā,Ubhopi byasanāni anubhonti".
thi10:1.0.218: p_19Th2_290"Upavijaññā gacchantī,addasāhaṁ patiṁ mataṁ;Panthamhi vijāyitvāna,appattāva sakaṁ gharaṁ.
thi10:1.0.219: p_19Th2_291Dve puttā kālakatā,Patī ca panthe mato kapaṇikāya;Mātā pitā ca bhātā,Ḍayhanti ca ekacitakāyaṁ".
thi10:1.0.220: p_19Th2_292"Khīṇakulīne kapaṇe,Anubhūtaṁ te dukhaṁ aparimāṇaṁ;Assū ca te pavattaṁ,Bahūni ca jātisahassāni.
thi10:1.0.221: p_19Th2_293Vasitā susānamajjhe,Athopi khāditāni puttamaṁsāni;Hatakulikā sabbagarahitā,Matapatikā amatamadhigacchiṁ.
thi10:1.0.222: p_19Th2_294Bhāvito me maggo,Ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko amatagāmī;Nibbānaṁ sacchikataṁ,Dhammādāsaṁavekkhiṁhaṁ.
thi10:1.0.223: p_19Th2_295Ahamamhi kantasallā,Ohitabhārā katañhi karaṇīyaṁ;Kisā gotamī therī,Vimuttacittā imaṁ bhaṇī"ti.
